title: Planting Cowpea protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"160h6","text":"Protocol to grow different accessions of cowpea seeds within a greenhouse in controlled conditions.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Pat down the soil gentle to give it some firmness (but still allowing movement for seeding)
Place the seed within the created hole and then cover the seed with soil. Repeat with seeds while labelling each pot with the accession number
creator: Stephanie Cullum
